verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am grateful for the things that you have done Yes, I'm grateful for the victories we've won I could go on and on and on about your works Because I'm grateful, grateful, so grateful just to praise you Lord Flowing from my heart are the issues of my heart, it's gratefulness I am grateful for the things that you have done Yes, I'm grateful for the victories we've won

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I could go on and on and on about your works Because I'm grateful, grateful, so grateful just to praise you Lord Flowing from my heart are the issues of my heart, it's gratefulness

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Grateful, grateful, grateful, grateful Grateful, grateful, grateful, grateful Grateful, grateful, grateful, gratefulness is flowing from my heart
